action_set_definitions.name: get_pipeline_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the status, stage list, and metadata for a specific pipeline execution.

run_id.description: The unique ID of the pipeline run (e.g., 'OPS-9288').

action_set_definitions.name: get_stage_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the execution logs for a specific pipeline stage to extract error details and security scan results.

example_output.logs: Security violation: found active key 'AWS_ID_8812' in /src/config.yaml

action_set_definitions.name: inspect_credential_status
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the central credential management system to verify if a credential is 'ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE', or 'EXPIRED'.

credential_id.description: The ID or name of the credential to verify.

action_set_definitions.name: read_repository_file
action_set_definitions.description: Reads the content of a specific file from the virtual filesystem to inspect configurations or legacy data.

file_path.description: The full path to the file.

action_set_definitions.name: find_credential_occurrences
action_set_definitions.description: Scans the entire repository to find every file path where a specific credential string or ID is exposed.

credential_pattern.description: The credential string or ID to search for.

action_set_definitions.name: remediate_and_rotate
action_set_definitions.description: Revokes the target credential and issues a new one, updating the internal secret manager.

credential_id.description: The ID of the active credential to rotate.

action_set_definitions.name: scrub_repository_history
action_set_definitions.description: Deletes the credential and purges all historical Git commits for a specified list of file paths.

file_paths.description: The list of all file paths containing the exposure.

action_set_definitions.name: trigger_pipeline_retry
action_set_definitions.description: Restarts the CI/CD pipeline run to verify the fix.

state_description.pipeline_metadata: General info about the pipeline run
state_description.pipeline_stages: The list of stages and their individual statuses
state_description.virtual_filesystem: A mapping of file paths to their current content within the simulated repository
state_description.logs_db: Storage of internal log strings mapped by stage name

virtual_filesystem.bitbucket-pipelines.yml:
image: atlassian/pipelines-awscli
stages:
  - lint
  - security-scan
  - deploy-init
  - production-rollout
virtual_filesystem.infra/vault_sync.py:
import os
# Syncs secrets from Vault to runner environment

logs_db.security-scan: Scan Complete. Findings: 0 High, 2 Low (Legacy files ignored).
logs_db.deploy-init: [ERROR] UnauthorizedException: The credential 'AKIA_PROD_LIVE_882' found in 'config/deploy_creds_v2.json' has been flagged for exposure in a public-facing temporary buffer 'scripts/backup_deploy.sh.tmp'. Mandatory Kill Switch engaged. Access to 'production-rollout' is locked until rotation and history scrub are verified.
logs_db.audit: System check: AKIA_LEGACY_EXPIRED_001 remains in state 'INACTIVE'. AKIA_STAGING_992 remains in state 'EXPIRED'.
